channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: France Will Ban Social Media For Children Under 15 https://www.engadget.com/2220289/france-will-ban-social-media-for-children-under-15/

item.title: RT by @BackTheBunny: hey hey. power laws are found in all things. because gravity flows through all things. explained:
item.description: phey hey. power laws are found in all things. because gravity flows through all things.br /br /explained:/phr /blockquoteb𝐃𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐲 - biofoundationalism.com (@BackTheBunny)/bppit's already happened. it's been happening. you should read. evidence included. the mechanisms. br /br /Midrange Jumpers for th

item.title: Mochi - The Bitcoin-native creator platform. Subscriptions, digital products, and exclusive content — all paid in sats. https://mochi-pay.com/
item.description: pMochi - The Bitcoin-native creator platform. Subscriptions, digital products, and exclusive content — all paid in sats. br /a href="https://mochi-pay.com/"mochi-pay.com//a/p

item.title: Ransomware Is Accelerating, But It's Not Because of AI
item.description: Researchers pointed to fragmentation of the ransomware ecosystem, the emergence of new attackers, and expansion of attacks on less defended organizations.

item.title: C'est une exception française, 99% des crédits immobiliers sont à taux fixe: les nouvelles règles européennes pourraient y mettre fin (pour protéger les banques) https://www.bfmtv.com/economie/entrepr

item.title: OpenAI Models Behind HuggingFace Cybersecurity Incident
item.description: pspanFrom the OpenAI blog post:/span/pblockquotepspanLast week, Hugging Face /spana href="https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"spandisclosed a new kind of security incident⁠(opens in a new window)/span/aspan after they detected and contain

item.title: Bitcoon world - Bitcoin should not be a secret. https://bitcoon.world/
item.description: pBitcoon world - Bitcoin should not be a secret. br /a href="https://bitcoon.world/"bitcoon.world//a/phr /bLink/bbr /a href="https://bitcoon.world/"img src="https://nitter.net/pic/card_img%2F2079654942135013376%2FDMgoieu_%3Fformat%3Dpng%26name%3D800x419" /br /bBitcoon.world - Bitcoin should not be a

item.title: AWS: A Framework for Quantum-Classical Integration Decisions
item.description: pJuly 21, 2026 &#8212; As quantum computing matures toward fault tolerance, a pressing question faces the high-performance computing (HPC) community: why is tightly integrating quantum processors to classical supercomputing infrastructure important? Today, algorithm researchers from Amazon Web Servi

item.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
item.description: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

item.title: Using LLMs to Find and Prioritize Vulnerabilities Is No Easy Task
item.description: The latest large language models have high false-positive rates and fail to take into account the context of scans, leading to more work for AppSec professionals.

item.title: Une vingtaine de climatiseurs livrés à l’hôpital d’Avesnes-sur-Helpe… qui ne peuvent pas être branchés https://www.lavoixdunord.fr/1723339/article/2026-07-21/une-vingtaine-de-climatiseurs-livres-l-hop

item.title: Crypto Clarity Act still at mercy of ethics section as Democrats balk at Trump deal
"Drawing" the Mona Lisa with GPT-5.6, Claude, Gemini, and Grok
item.description: a href="https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48998404"Comments/a

item.title: WeirdChat: A catalog of unexpected AI behaviors, discovered automatically
item.description: pispan[This is a link-post for /span/ia href="https://transluce.org/weirdchat" rel="noreferrer"ispanhttps://transluce.org/weirdchat/span/i/aispan. We recommend reading the website version for interactive visualizations.] /span/i/ppbspanLanguage models can behave in surprising and sometimes harmful w

item.title: Crypto Rallies as Reported Ethics Deal Revives Odds of CLARITY Act Senate Vote
item.description: Bitcoin reclaimed $66,000 after reports that the White House circulated agreed-upon ethics-provision language to Senate Republicans, removing the main obstacle to a floor vote before the August recess.

item.title: A digestion of the Jacobian conjecture counterexample
item.description: pArticle URL: a href="https://terrytao.wordpress.com/2026/07/21/a-digestion-of-the-jacobian-conjecture-counterexample/"https://terrytao.wordpress.com/2026/07/21/a-digestion-of-the-jacobian-conjecture-counterexample//a/ppComments URL: a href="https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48998362"https://news
